name: team-communication-protocols
title: Team Communication Protocols
summary: Structured messaging protocols for agent team communication including message type selection, plan approval, shutdown procedures, and anti-patterns to avoid. Use this skill when establishing team communication norms, handling plan approvals, or managing team shutdown.
